title: FeeApplicationTimingModalityTypeValues
description: Describes when the fee is applied.

x-enumeration-literals.name: One-time
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charged once for a specific event (e.g. account opening).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Recurring (Periodic)
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charged on a regular schedule (e.g. monthly maintenance fee).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Per Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charged each time a qualifying transaction occurs (e.g. ATM withdrawal).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Event-triggered
x-enumeration-literals.description: Applied only when a specific event happens (e.g. overdraft fee, bounced check).
